Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st  buses are temporarily rerouted  : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st  buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

 Buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Western, Marquette, Damen and 69th due to street blockage near 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.
